summary: Completed comprehensive testing of land dealing platform MVP. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate) after fixing user ID bug. Frontend UI and integration testing successful across all user roles (admin, seller, buyer). All core features tested including authentication, role-based access, listing management, admin approval workflow, search/filter functionality.

resolved_bugs.issue: KeyError: 'id' in user object causing 500 errors
resolved_bugs.fix_applied: Fixed user object to use 'id' instead of '_id' in get_current_user function

design_issues.issue: Bright yellow background color scheme may not align with 'modern minimalistic' design preference

passed_tests: User registration for buyer and seller roles
Role-based access control and protected routes
Seller dashboard and listing management UI
Admin approval workflow and listing management
